title: peristylus umbonatus
intro: Peristylus umbonatus, also known as the hooded orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peristylus umbonatus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used to make teas or infusions.
